features.description: Review tests/pipeline/ for anti-patterns: test-shaped validation, missing side-effect checks, hardcoded-pass inputs, missing modifier setup
steps: List all #[test] functions in tests/pipeline/

For each test function, check: (1) assertions verify SPECIFIC expected values, not is_some()/is_ok(), (2) side effects are verified (callbacks, signals, state propagation), (3) test would FAIL if implementation were subtly wrong, (4) modifier keys set correctly for modifier-dependent tests, (5) test exercises actual behavior, not just compilation
Fix any defective test by strengthening its assertions
If a strengthened test now FAILS: that is a real bug. Fix the production code too.
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings: zero warnings
